theme: Trump Coups and Advanced Trump Technique
description: Hands covering trump promotion, uppercuts, the trump coup, and advanced techniques for managing trump suit endings.

hands.title: 231. Uppercut or trump promotion
hands.notes: West leads hearts. East ruffs the third heart with the 4, but West's Q97 sits behind your AKJT — the uppercut promotes West's queen.

hands.title: 232. Force and promotion
hands.notes: Defenders force declarer to ruff repeatedly. Each ruff shortens declarer and may promote a defender's intermediate trump into a winner.

hands.title: 233. Simple trump coup
hands.notes: West holds T97 of trumps behind your AKJ. Reduce to equal trump length, then lead through West at trick 12 to finesse without leading trump.

hands.title: 234. Shortening trumps for trump coup
hands.notes: Ruff a diamond in hand to shorten your trumps. You must reduce to the same number of trumps as West before the coup ending.

hands.title: 235. Reduce to equal trump length
hands.notes: Count West's trumps (three). Ruff enough times in hand to come down to three trumps yourself — then the coup works at the end.

hands.title: 236. Overruff trap
hands.notes: Lead a suit where East must ruff. If East ruffs with the 3, you overruff. If East ruffs high, your remaining trump holding is promoted.

hands.title: 237. Force defender to overruff
hands.notes: Engineer a position where a defender must ruff with an honor, promoting your intermediate trump into a winner.

hands.title: 238. Promotion through repeated forcing
hands.notes: Force defenders to ruff multiple times. Each defensive ruff with a high trump promotes your remaining intermediate trumps.

hands.title: 239. Crossruff vs trump coup decision
hands.notes: A crossruff looks tempting but risks an overruff. Instead, prepare a trump coup ending — ruff once, cash winners, then coup West's tenace.

hands.title: 240. Entry timing in trump end positions
hands.notes: You must be in dummy at trick 11 to lead through West's T9 of trumps. Preserve the diamond ace as a late entry to dummy.
